column1: # /Worksheet Delete File — drop the foreground active file from memory.
# Mirror of M5_file_open.tsv: load two distinct files alongside each
# other, switch focus to the second, then /WDF and verify that the
# survivor is the file we did NOT delete.  Deleting the last remaining
# active file leaves a single blank workbook (mirrors /Worksheet Erase
# Yes — there is always at least one active file).
# --- fresh file; build B on disk ---
# --- /FOA loads B alongside; current view stays on A ---
# --- Ctrl-End + Ctrl-PgDn rotates focus to file B ---
# --- /WDF deletes B; the surviving file (A) takes focus ---
# --- /WDF on the last remaining file leaves one blank workbook ---
